utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items. Each item is fully specified with details and associated costs. The health_coverage section includes both physical and mental health details with costs. The property_coverage includes scope (home contents, luxury items) and costs. The travel_coverage includes details of coverage types and costs. The additional_services section includes enhancements with costs. The total_budget section includes both monthly and annual breakdowns. Therefore, all items are fully covered according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes several components that can be mapped to the ground-truth ratings. For health coverage, the physical_health description mentions 'Global network coverage with telemedicine, 5% deductible, 24/7 emergency support'—this matches the LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8) which features low 5% deductible and telemedicine, rather than the premium zero-deductible plans. The mental_health description mentions 'Family therapy included, gym reimbursement, comprehensive mental health coverage'—this aligns with LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8) under mental health, as it specifically covers family therapy. For property_coverage, 'High-value items covered, electronics coverage, temporary accommodation' matches InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 7). For travel_coverage, the phrases '€30,000 coverage limit, adventure sports covered, business travel protection' and 'Enhanced coverage for 150+ annual travel days' point to InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 7) under travel insurance, as it includes business travel protection and adventure activities. For additional_services, the 'concierge_services' and 'premium_addons' correspond to the travel_enhancement_services 'Concierge Services' (rating 7) and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 8), respectively.
